mapper.select:
SELECT gr.guide_id, gr.selection_id, gr.teacher_id, u_t.real_name AS teacherName, gr.student_id, u_s.real_name AS studentName, u_s.student_no AS studentNo, CASE WHEN ps.is_custom_topic = 1 THEN ps.custom_topic_name ELSE pt.topic_name END AS topicName, ps.campus_name AS campusName, ps.academic_year AS academicYear, gr.guide_time, gr.place, gr.duration_minutes, gr.guidance_type, gr.content, gr.attachment_id, gr.student_feedback AS studentFeedback, gr.feedback_time AS feedbackTime, gr.status, gr.create_time, IFNULL(cnt.cnt, 0) AS totalGuidesForStudent FROM guidance_record gr LEFT JOIN sys_user u_t ON gr.teacher_id = u_t.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u_s ON gr.student_id = u_s.user_id LEFT JOIN project_selection ps ON gr.selection_id = ps.selection_id LEFT JOIN project_topic pt ON ps.topic_id = pt.topic_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT student_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM guidance_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY student_id ) cnt ON gr.student_id = cnt.student_id
gr.is_deleted = 0
AND ps.campus_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{campusName}, '%')
AND ps.academic_year = #{academicYear}
AND (u_s.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u_s.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u_t.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND gr.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
ORDER BY gr.guide_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO guidance_record ( selection_id, teacher_id, student_id, guide_time, place, duration_minutes, guidance_type, content, attachment_id, status, academic_year, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{selectionId}, #{teacherId}, #{studentId}, #{guideTime}, #{place}, #{durationMinutes}, #{guidanceType}, #{content}, #{attachmentId}, #{status}, #{academicYear}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT ps.selection_id AS selectionId, u.real_name AS studentName, u.student_no AS studentNo, CASE WHEN ps.is_custom_topic = 1 THEN ps.custom_topic_name ELSE pt.topic_name END AS topicName, ps.custom_topic_name AS customTopicName, ps.is_custom_topic AS isCustomTopic, ps.academic_year AS academicYear, ps.status, ps.create_time AS createTime FROM project_selection ps INNER JOIN sys_user u ON ps.student_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN project_topic pt ON ps.topic_id = pt.topic_id INNER JOIN guidance_relation gr ON ps.selection_id = gr.selection_id AND gr.teacher_id = #{teacherId} WHERE ps.is_deleted = 0 AND ps.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY ps.create_time DESC
